summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the redesigned Incident Report page. All 5-step form features working correctly including: incident types selection, severity levels, witness information, photo upload area, review/submit with toggle options, and success modal. Form navigation (Continue/Back buttons), data persistence across steps, and Past Reports list after submission all verified.
passed_tests: Incident list view: 'New Incident Report' button with pink/magenta gradient (from-[#be185d] to-[#9d174d])
Incident list view: 'Past Reports' section with count badge showing correct number
Step 1: All 6 incident types displayed (Fall, Medication Issue, Behavioral Change, Injury, Vital Sign Concern, Other)
Step 1: Each incident type has icon and description
Step 1: Progress bar shows 5 segments with first segment red (#ff3b5c)
Step 1: Continue button disabled until incident type selected
Step 2: Severity Level buttons displayed (Low, Medium, High, Critical)
Step 2: 'What happened?' textarea present (data-testid: incident-description)
Step 2: 'Actions Taken' textarea present (data-testid: incident-actions)
Step 3: Witness Information section with 'Witness Name(s)' textarea
Step 3: Blue info box with witness name format instructions
Step 3: 'No witnesses were present' checkbox
Step 3: Checkbox correctly disables witness textarea when checked
Step 4: Add Photos section with camera upload area
Step 4: Upload area has dashed border styling
Step 5: Review & Submit shows summary card with incident details
Step 5: 'Notify Family Member' toggle with green checkmark (#22c55e)
Step 5: 'Follow-up Required' toggle with green checkmark
Step 5: Toggle options change background color when active (green: bg-[#0d3320])
Submit: Success modal overlay appears with dark background (#2c2c2e)
Submit: Modal shows 'OK' button (data-testid: incident-ok-btn)
Submit: Message mentions 'Family has been notified' when toggle enabled
After submit: Incident appears in Past Reports list with correct type and severity badge

test_credentials.registration: Create new account via 'Start Free Trial' > 'I'm a Caregiver'

seed_data_creation: None - incidents stored in component state, mocked API

mocked_apis_list: Incidents stored in component state via useState
Data passed via onAddIncident callback prop
No backend API calls for incident storage

context_for_next_testing_agent: Incident Report page fully tested. Key data-testids: new-incident-btn, incident-type-{fall|medication|behavioral|injury|vital|other}, severity-{low|medium|high|critical}, incident-description, incident-actions, incident-witnesses, no-witnesses-checkbox, photo-upload, notify-family-toggle, followup-toggle, incident-continue-btn, incident-back-btn, incident-submit-btn, incident-ok-btn, incident-cancel-btn. The form has 5 steps controlled by useState(step). activeView controls 'history' vs 'new' view. Dark theme with pink/red accent colors verified.

incident_list_view.past_reports_section: Shows count badge, lists submitted incidents

step_1_incident_type.icons: Each type has unique icon (AlertTriangle, Pill, Activity, Bandage, Thermometer, HelpCircle)

step_2_severity_details.validation: Continue disabled until severity and description filled

step_3_witness_info.checkbox: 'No witnesses were present' - disables textarea when checked

step_5_review_submit.summary_card: Shows type, severity, description, actions, witnesses, photos count

success_modal.ok_button: Blue text, dismisses modal and returns to history view
